positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    braga != fluminense).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    nautico != fluminense).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ailton != fluminense).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ailton != braga).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    braga != nautico).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ailton != nautico).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define plays_for(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define brazilian(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
2. plays_for(ailton,nautico) [input(axiom)]
3. brazilian(ailton) [input(axiom)]
5. ? [X0] : (plays_for(X0,nautico) & brazilian(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~? [X0] : (plays_for(X0,nautico) & brazilian(X0)) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ! [X0] : (~plays_for(X0,nautico) | ~brazilian(X0)) [ennf transformation 6]
9. plays_for(ailton,nautico) [cnf transformation 2]
10. brazilian(ailton) [cnf transformation 3]
17. ~plays_for(X0,nautico) | ~brazilian(X0) [cnf transformation 7]
18. ~brazilian(ailton) [resolution 9,17]
19. $false [forward subsumption resolution 18,10]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
